title: NovoJuris Legal advises Zaggle on acquisition of DICE
description: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Limited has acquired assets and intellectual property from Dice Enterprises, which include AI-enabled spend management platform, enterprise customer contracts, proprietary intellectual property, and technology infrastructure.NovoJuris Legal advised Zaggle on this transaction.
